option.name: originalContent
option.value:
Object:subClass("BasePanel")
--对应的Unity面板对象 BasePanel.panelObject = nil
function BasePanel:Init(panelObject) self.panelObject = panelObject end
--找到某个控件 function BasePanel:FindComponentByName(componentName , componentType) if self.panelObject == nil then print("panelObject为空，无法找到组件") return nil end
local componentTransform = self.panelObject.transform:Find(componentName) if componentTransform == nil then print("节点未找到：" .. componentName) return nil end
local component = componentTransform:GetComponent(typeof(componentType))
if component == nil then print(componentName .. "组件未找到,类型：" .. componentType) end
return component end
function BasePanel:GetComponent(componentName) local component = self.components[componentName] if component == nil then print("组件未找到：" .. componentName) return nil end
return component end

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
Object:subClass("BasePanel")
--对应的Unity面板对象 BasePanel.panelObject = nil
function BasePanel:Init(panelObject) self.panelObject = panelObject end
--找到某个控件 function BasePanel:FindComponentByName(componentName , componentType) if self.panelObject == nil then print("panelObject为空，无法找到组件") return nil end
local componentTransform = self.panelObject.transform:Find(componentName) if componentTransform == nil then print("节点未找到：" .. componentName) return nil end
local component = componentTransform:GetComponent(typeof(componentType))
if component == nil then print(componentName .. "组件未找到,类型：" .. componentType) end
return component end
function BasePanel:GetComponent(componentName) local component = self.components[componentName] if component == nil then print("组件未找到：" .. componentName) return nil end
return component end
